title: How do I update my Student/Employee Hub password and picture?
plain_text: You can edit or update your Student Hub account details, such as passwords, profile pictures, and other personal information. See How do I access the Student Hub? or How do I access the Employee Hub? for instructions on how to access the Student/Employee Hub. Note: You can follow these steps on a mobile device or in the Student/Employee Hub app for Microsoft Teams. Table of contents: Update password, Update profile picture. Update password: 1. Select Account Settings from the Student/Employee Hub homepage. 2. You will be directed to a page where you can change your password. Enter your current password and a new password that meets the security criteria. 3. Select Save. If the Save button is grayed out, verify that your new password meets all the criteria. Note: Password changes may take up to 5 minutes to sync. See How do I reset my forgotten Northeastern account password? if you are experiencing password-related issues. Update profile picture: 1. Select the profile photo from the Student/Employee Hub homepage. 2. In the new window, select the camera icon to the left of the current profile picture. 3. Select 'Upload a new photo.' 4. Browse your local libraries and select a photo of your choice. 5. Select Apply after positioning the photo. Note: This change will also apply to all your Microsoft 365 apps, including Microsoft Teams. Please allow up to 24 hours for the photo to be processed into the Student/Employee Hub profile.

sections.text: You can edit or update your Student Hub account details, such as passwords, profile pictures, and other personal information. See How do I access the Student Hub? or How do I access the Employee Hub? for instructions on how to access the Student/Employee Hub. Note: You can follow these steps on a mobile device or in the Student/Employee Hub app for Microsoft Teams.

sections.text: 1. Select Account Settings from the Student/Employee Hub homepage. 2. You will be directed to a page where you can change your password. Enter your current password and a new password that meets the security criteria. 3. Select Save. If the Save button is grayed out, verify that your new password meets all the criteria. Note: Password changes may take up to 5 minutes to sync. See How do I reset my forgotten Northeastern account password? if you are experiencing password-related issues.

sections.heading: Update profile picture

Select 'Upload a new photo.' 4. Browse your local libraries and select a photo of your choice. 5. Select Apply after positioning the photo. Note: This change will also apply to all your Microsoft 365 apps, including Microsoft Teams. Please allow up to 24 hours for the photo to be processed into the Student/Employee Hub profile.
